name: codex-companion
description: Vornik async-offload companion for Codex. Delegate reviews, audits, validations, research, summarization, and project RAG memory work to a vornik daemon over MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate async agent work from Codex to vornik.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to the vornik companion MCP endpoint so Codex can queue long-running reviews, audits, validation, research, summarization, and RAG memory operations without doing all work inline.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the vornik companion MCP tools when work is large, async-friendly, or should be preserved in project memory. Recall before delegating research or review work. ALWAYS pass repo_scope on every recall/remember/recent_memory/delegate/memory_correct call: resolve it once per session from `git config --get remote.origin.url`, normalized to a host/path token (strip trailing .git, scheme, and any leading user@; replace the first ':' with '/') — e.g. github.com/grinco/vornik. Derive it from the remote; never hand-guess or lowercase it. Omitting repo_scope makes deposits land NULL-scoped and pollutes other repos' recalls.
